name: Peppy Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine cereal, pretzel sticks and peanuts in a large bowl.
3. Add butter and mix well until the ingredients are evenly coated.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and chili powder.
5. Mix thoroughly to ensure even distribution of seasonings.
6. Spread the mixture onto an ungreased 10-inch X 15-inch jelly roll pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally during baking to prevent burning.
